title: Fix Dockerfile CMD to point to dist/http-server.mjs
description: Dockerfile:104 has CMD ["bun", "run", "dist/http-server.js"] but the build emits dist/http-server.mjs (ESM). The image crashes on start. Also remove the redundant `bun build ./src/http-server.ts --outdir ./dist --target node` on line 39 (it produces a duplicate that masks the real bug).
validation: Read Dockerfile, confirm CMD references dist/http-server.mjs. Confirm line 39 redundant build is removed.
